summary: Comprehensive testing of ReportBridge demo onboarding system. All 10 test cases PASS. Fresh signup redirects to demo preview, demo banner shows correctly with all 3 controls, KPI values valid, login flow redirects when has_seen_demo=False, mark-demo-seen works, subsequent login goes to dashboard, demo@reportbridge.io goes to dashboard, all 3 sample CSV download buttons present in Step 2.
critical_code_review_comments: mark-demo-seen is called twice on initial signup preview (double console log '[DEMO] marked as seen') - minor, does not affect correctness since endpoint is idempotent
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 onboarding demo features verified working. signup route is /signup (not /register). Sessions can expire quickly in test environment. Login after mark-demo-seen correctly goes to /app. demo@reportbridge.io has has_seen_demo=True. Sample CSV buttons exist in Step 2 with correct testids.

test_results.1_fresh_signup: PASS - Redirected to /app/reports/{id}/preview, has_seen_demo=False, demo_report_id returned
test_results.2_fresh_login_flow: PASS - API verified: login with has_seen_demo=False returns demo_report_id, same ID as signup
test_results.3_demo_banner: PASS - demo-banner, demo-banner-cta, demo-banner-dismiss all visible; dismiss works
test_results.4_mark_demo_seen: PASS - After mark-demo-seen, login returns has_seen_demo=True, demo_report_id=null, user goes to /app
test_results.5_demo_data_correctness: PASS - Client name is 'Acme Marketing', KPI values computed correctly
test_results.6_idempotency: PASS - Same demo_report_id returned on multiple logins before mark-seen; null after mark-seen
test_results.7_demo_user_login: PASS - demo@reportbridge.io goes to /app (not preview), has_seen_demo=True
test_results.8_dashboard_empty_state: PASS - demo user has reports table with reports (not empty state)
test_results.9_sample_csv_buttons: PASS - All 3 buttons present: download-sample-standard, download-sample-google-ads, download-sample-meta-ads
test_results.10_kpi_values: PASS - All 5 KPI cards show valid values: Total Spend $5,302.11, Total Leads 498, Total Revenue $16,506.68, CPL $10.65, ROAS 3.11x
